1_screen_definitions.viewport_target: Desktop Optimized (1440px corporate asset control matrix canvas layout)
1_screen_definitions.main_layout_template: Two-Column Split Asset Panel (Left Side Panel Grid: Capital Asset Inventory Sheet & Lifetime Value Meter; Right Side Panel Grid: Asset Capitalization Workspace & Active Amortization Forecasting Schedule Table; Top Summary Header: Core Capital Metric Cards Tracking Net Book Value [NBV], Gross Asset Value, Accumulated Depreciation)

responsive_breakpoints.desktop: min-width: 1280px (Renders simultaneous depreciation line curves over multiple financial intervals columns)
responsive_breakpoints.tablet_landscape: 1024px - 1279px (Amortization schedule sub-tables switch to a responsive accordion system underneath active selections)

key_visible_sections.title: Straight-Line Monthly Depreciation Breakdown
key_visible_sections.type: Interactive Forecasting Historical Ledger Data Grid

user_progression_routes.on_load: Acquire active asset account classifications data mapping indexes -> Check background message brokers for un-capitalized parts arriving from procurement -> Execute state payload fetch from CapitalAssetService.getCapitalAssets()
user_progression_routes.on_asset_row_click: Asynchronously run CapitalAssetService.getDepreciationSchedule() to fill and map individual rows data into the active amortization_schedule_timeline workspace fields

redirection_rules.condition: If an asset record's internal Net Book Value reaches exact zero metrics while its state parameter marks it as fully operational
redirection_rules.action: Transition inline asset state markers to 'Fully Depreciated - Salvage Class Residual Hold' and block manual calculation overwrites

modal_and_drawer_overlays.trigger: User clicks cell context command button element 'btn_capitalize_staged_equipment'
modal_and_drawer_overlays.behavior: Pop structural overlay asset provisioning wizard form allowing manual classification modifications, asset tag numbering, and useful life allocation assignments

atoms.type: Numeric Value Field Form Input Component Box
Visual Balance Gauge Line Indicator Component

molecules.composition: Combines aggregate balance text description row + high-precision monetary display block + calculated comparison percentages vector lines elements
Combines hardware graphic element token + origin SCM purchase tag reference number text link + automated initialization action button wrapper element

organisms.composition: Virtual row streaming collection tracking capitalized machinery parameters: unique asset identification numbers, descriptive tags, hardware system references (`eam_equipment_id`), acquisition costs values, scrap valuation targets numbers, useful life parameters, and interactive asset status pills.

Chronological timeline rows plotting periodic data: calendar month markers, periodic depreciation expense entries, accumulated value totals summaries, and resulting Net Book Value changes graphs columns.

typography_tokens.font_family_stack: Inter UI, sans-serif (Engineered strictly to coordinate grid content parameters text weights)

scales.asset_financial_large_monetary: font-size: 1.75rem (28px) | font-weight: 700 | font-family: monospace tabular-numerals configuration parameters

color_palette_hex.background_canvas_base: #0B0F19 (Deep Obsidian Enterprise Tech Dark Mode Base Layout Grid)
color_palette_hex.surface_panels_elevated: #1E293B (Slate Matrix Boundary Panel Grid Container Viewport Frame)
color_palette_hex.capital_accent_blue: #3B82F6 (Corporate Royal Blue Asset Management Focus Tone)
color_palette_hex.salvage_value_neutral: #94A3B8 (Muted Gray Amortized Capital Balance Tracking Value Lines Accent)
color_palette_hex.disposal_alert_orange: #F59E0B (Amber Orange Asset Elimination/Write-off Flag Color Metric)

spacing_and_borders.standard_padding_unit: 1rem (16px workspace block boundary partitions padding specifications)
spacing_and_borders.timeline_dense_row_gap: 0.375rem (6px dense layout formatting parameters dividing forecast lines)
spacing_and_borders.border_style_token: 1px solid #334155 (Slate Charcoal Frame Outlines Mapping Layer Grids)

micro_interactions.style_mutation: background-color properties shift context color to value #334155 utilizing an smooth ease-in animation curves transition constraint window of 120ms
Fires instant recalculation trigger updates flashing calculated layout metrics inline using a soft background-color illumination pulse look filter

accessibility_aria_roles.fixed_asset_registry_master_table: role='grid' housing dynamic accessible rows grouping indices specifications maps
accessibility_aria_roles.amortization_schedule_forecasting_sheet: role='table' displaying static calculated read-only numerical estimation rows columns maps layouts frameworks

capitalized_assets_registry_collection.asset_name: Heavy Duty Robotic Precision Assembler Array (Line 04 Facility Bundle)

local_reactive_state_variables.selected_capital_asset_pointer_id: Tracks target active asset registry row data identifier key used to request matching forecast arrays (string | null default pointer value)
local_reactive_state_variables.is_provisioning_wizard_open: Boolean state toggling layout matrix layer visibility boundaries wrapping new asset registration workflow forms inputs wizard fields
local_reactive_state_variables.live_computed_forecast_buffer_cache: Reactive object block array structure capturing immediate sandbox modifications to user parameters inside inputs forms before submissions approvals triggers

global_application_context_bindings.active_selected_legal_entity_id: Shared application instance tenant context parameters mapping cross-module enterprise operations scopes configurations settings
global_application_context_bindings.scm_equipment_staged_receipt_bus: Local component messaging consumer array generating floating context banner indicators when warehouse inventory workflows stage capital infrastructure machinery items

8_technical_requirements.frontend_technical_constraints: Vanilla HTML5 semantic components layouts structured using standard Tailwind CSS classes utility rules codebases run natively using structural ES6 asynchronous modules logic systems implementing rigorous mathematical fraction isolation wrappers ensuring rounding data compliance profiles parameters boundaries match general accounting metrics
8_technical_requirements.performance_benchmarks: Recalculating 60-month straight line calculations grids fields vectors inside user view spaces following change parameters events must evaluate data rows array updates under a strict execution target threshold parameter of 8ms

element_interaction_links.target_mutation_action: Bind return periodic data collections maps directly inside local state storage data collections variables tracking values, and assign active value pointer keys to selected_capital_asset_pointer_id to populate timeline components layouts

Transmit confirmation transaction logs packages; push generated capital row data records straight inside capitalized_assets_registry_collection local caches matrices; trigger application interface closures over wizard fields layer elements variables flags

element_interaction_links.navigates_to_route: /finance/liquidity (Pushes router frame view pointer context ahead into final Screen 6 Multi-Tenant Corporate Cash & Trial Balance Reporting Hub Workspace Viewport)
